content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size_6 ∧ part_time_devops ∧ 4_months_timeline ∧ single_postgresql_database
H: manageable_complexity ∧ ease_of_deployment ∧ shared_resource_efficiency ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_initial_release → ensure_module_boundaries → prepare_for_future_split
R: ! scalability_challenges ∧ ! bottleneck_in_team_effort ∧ ! difficulty_in_inter-module_communication
A: modular_monolith_is_best_fit_for_team_size_and_timeline ∧ development_efforts_can_scale_post-release

[AUDIT]
Decision based on team and timeline constraints.

structured_data.audit: Decision based on team and timeline constraints.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size(6) ∧ part_time_devops ∧ timeline(4_months) ∧ data_store(postgresql)
H: simple_deployment ∧ lower_complexity ∧ single_database ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: deploy_single_region → focus_on_core_features → modular_code_structure
R: ! scalability_limitations ∧ ! future_split_complexity ∧ ! resource_overhead
A: modular_monolith_best_suited_for_team_size ∧ initial_traffic_manageable ∧ future_growth_considered

[AUDIT]
A modular monolith simplifies development and deployment under current constraints.
draft_content:
@sigil v0 hybrid  
G: select(default_architecture)  
C: team_size(6) ∧ infrastructure_modern ∧ initial_traffic(low)  
H: future_split(billing,core_app) ⇒ modular_setup  
P: Δ(architecture_choice) → deploy(single_region)  
V: cloud_service(BaaS) ∧ pg_database(postgres)  
R: ! overprovision_resources  
A: scalable ∧ maintainable  

[AUDIT]  
A default cloud-based architecture using PostgreSQL ensures scalability and maintainability with minimal overhead and complexity for initial traffic.

structured_data.audit: A modular monolith simplifies development and deployment under current constraints.
